headline: TEVA's Prolia Biosimilar Gets FDA Nod, Xolair Filing Accepted
summary: Teva wins FDA approval for Prolia biosimilar Ponlimsi and secures Xolair biosimilar filing review by the FDA and EMA, strengthening its biosimilars push.

raw.headline: TEVA's Prolia Biosimilar Gets FDA Nod, Xolair Filing Accepted
raw.summary: Teva wins FDA approval for Prolia biosimilar Ponlimsi and secures Xolair biosimilar filing review by the FDA and EMA, strengthening its biosimilars push.

headline: FDA Says Amgen’s Tavneos Linked to Liver Injuries, Deaths
summary: The FDA said it has identified 76 cases of drug-induced liver injuries with reasonable evidence of being causally linked to Tavneos.

raw.headline: FDA Says Amgen’s Tavneos Linked to Liver Injuries, Deaths
raw.summary: The FDA said it has identified 76 cases of drug-induced liver injuries with reasonable evidence of being causally linked to Tavneos.

headline: FDA Warns Of Fatal Liver Risks Linked To Amgen Tavneos Use
summary: FDA flags liver injury risk tied to Amgen Tavneos, citing drug-induced liver injury and rare vanishing bile duct syndrome complications.

raw.headline: FDA Warns Of Fatal Liver Risks Linked To Amgen Tavneos Use
raw.summary: FDA flags liver injury risk tied to Amgen Tavneos, citing drug-induced liver injury and rare vanishing bile duct syndrome complications.

headline: Viridian tumbles on positive data for key eye drug prospect
summary: The data did not meet investor expectations, and could bring “fierce investor debate on commercial feasibility,” according to an analyst.

headline: The Zacks Analyst Blog  Roche Holding, AT&T and Amgen
summary: AMGN, T, and Roche shares outperform as strong drug portfolios and wireless momentum offset key headwinds like pricing pressure and legacy declines.
